meta_title: Carlos Mauro Cárdenas — Engineering · AI · Data · Lima, Peru
meta_desc: Carlos Mauro Cárdenas Fernández — Engineer in GenAI, AI agents, blockchain, quantum computing, machine learning, DevOps, cloud and data science. Lima, Peru. UNI-FIIS lecturer and creator of SalariosPerú.
og_title: Carlos Mauro Cárdenas — Engineering · AI · Data
og_desc: Engineer in GenAI, AI agents, ML, cloud and data science. Lima, Peru. Creator of SalariosPerú.
creed: «I believe in the *love* of human beings.»
sec_ia_s: Agents, LLMs and applied machine learning.
sec_peru_s: Citizen dashboards built on official public data.
sec_ninos_s: Projects made with love for the little ones. 💞
sec_docencia_s: Class materials, university courses and my thesis. 🎓
footer_built: Built with HTML and CSS · No frameworks · Code on
d_agentflow: Demo platform for multi-agent sales orchestration: dashboard, omnichannel inbox, pipeline, AI agents, automations and analytics. Static SPA with sample data (no backend).
d_suyay: Interactive demo of a WhatsApp coaching agent for UNI engineering students: grade lookup, calculating the score needed to pass, exam reminders and empathetic support (including the TRICA case). Simulated responses in the browser, no real data.
d_modelo: Public presentation of the research project: an AI model (SVM + RF + GB ensemble) to predict academic performance and dropout among engineering students. Rationale, variables, pipeline, ethical capture of sensitive data, psychometric validation and early warning.
t_inti: Proyecto INTI — Digital Twin of Peru 2075 🌞
d_inti: Territorial intelligence system for Peru's 1,891 districts with real data (HDI 2019, poverty and population from the 2017 INEI Census): 12 indices, diagnosis, 2075 foresight, national Leaflet map, district ranking, Top 50 projects, AI engine (OpenRouter) and municipal plans in PDF.
d_petroperu: Public dashboard tracking Petroperú's financial, operational and corporate-governance evolution (20 years): 16 financial ratios, 5 boards, an interactive governance graph, a "play the director" simulator to turn the company around, and a Bloomberg-style day/night mode. Static SPA; seed data flagged as illustrative until audited financial statements are loaded.
d_congreso: Open-data observatory of the Congreso de la República: 14,704 bills, 3,826 laws, 59 committees and 11 years of real budget (S/625M→S/1,769M) scraped from the MEF. Dynamic year filter, light/dark mode and shareable cards.
d_riesgos: Citizen dashboard on disasters and preparedness: earthquakes, tsunamis, El Niño, landslides, cold spells, deforestation, pandemics and global crises. Includes 6 interactive simulators (seismic, tsunami, SEIR pandemic, blackout, food crisis, El Niño). Data from IGP/SENAMHI/INDECI/MINAM/CENEPRED.
d_finanzas: Interactive dashboard with 35 years (1990-2026) of data: GDP, public debt, budget, execution by region and by ministry portfolio, SUNAT tax revenue, mining and foreign trade. Official data from BCRP/MEF/INEI.
d_colegios: Peruvian education-assessment dashboard — ENLA 2024 results, comparison by region/district, urban-rural gaps, reading vs mathematics. Data from MINEDU/UMC.
t_oaf: Separations, complaints and prison for OAF
d_oaf: Latam dashboard of complaints, separations and prison for Failure to Provide Family Support (OAF) + comparative legal framework + Ley 27806 templates to obtain more public data.
d_salarios: Public dashboard analyzing Peruvian salaries: private sector (2,068 records) + public sector CAS (scraped daily) + socioeconomic level calculator (APEIM) + INEI ENAHO context.
d_transparencia: Why salary transparency matters: Nordic vs Peru comparison, dashboard use cases, FAQ. Companion to the SalariosPerú project.
d_vuelos: Global real-time ATC dashboard: ~10-15k active aircraft on a world map, top 10 countries, altitude distribution and a table of the fastest flights. Auto-refresh every 30s. Data from OpenSky Network, no backend or API key.
d_libelula: Kawaii school exhibit about the dragonfly: 6 fun facts, photos, an origami video, a mini-game, a QR code for the leaflet and a community gallery to upload photos (Supabase). Made for my son Gael's exhibit (3 years old).
d_panchita: School project about Panchita, the neighborhood kitty in Pueblo Libre (Lima): photo gallery, fun facts, location map and how to help her. Installable PWA made with love for the neighborhood's little paws.
d_tesis: LaTeX template for the thesis of the Faculty of Industrial and Systems Engineering (UNI), created for my defense in 2009. Complete structure: cover page, indexes, chapters, bibliography. Reusable by other thesis writers.
t_biotec: Data Analysis in Biotechnology with Python 🧬
d_biotec: Class material (Escuela Global): DNA, RNA and proteins. Slides + Google Colab notebook for biological data analysis with Python.
d_sisop: Slides from the Operating Systems course (UNI-FIIS): process management, concurrency, deadlock, virtual memory, I/O devices, virtualization and security.
d_mecatronica: Material from the graduate course in Mechatronics (2021): notebooks and Python code for applied teaching.
d_quantum: Curated quantum computing resources: books, papers and videos.
d_lifecompass: Suicide prevention dashboard: global statistics, helplines, multilingual (EN/ES/ZH/KO/RU).
d_springer: Scraper for free Springer books during COVID-19.
d_blog: My personal blog: technology, AI, data, society and notes from a hacker with heart. Long-form writing that won't fit in a tweet.
d_observatorio: Transparency for Peru's state companies (FONAFE + regional water utilities): KPIs, finances, real procurement (OCDS/OECE), rankings, diagnosis and recommendations. Static dashboard + versioned ETL.
d_defensa: Financial intelligence on Peru's Defense & Interior sector: state companies (SIMA, FAME, SEMAN), budget by agency and investment projects, pensions (CPMP) and pay scales by rank. Real, sourced data; unpublished figures flagged as estimates. Includes an AI assistant.
d_actas: Citizen vote-tally (PVT) for Peru's 2026 presidential runoff: snap the official ONPE tally sheet, an AI (Gemini) reads the handwritten votes, with arithmetic validation, de-duplication by table, batch upload, a live dashboard and an editable ONPE comparison.
d_poder: Who controls what? Peru's economic groups, companies, shareholders and boards rebuilt as a graph from public data (SMV · BVL · SBS): PageRank, Louvain communities, an Economic Power Index (0–100), network affinity and conflict-of-interest detection. Static dashboard + versioned ETL.
d_transparente: A national map of public officials, government entities, state-owned companies and power networks: a unified database, a national power graph and dashboards built from public data (PTE, Comptroller, FONAFE, OCDS, SERVIR…). Source-traceable data, anti-overclaiming by design.
d_turbonotes: Voice-first notes app: dictate with AI (Whisper), read them aloud, and auto-title hands-free by saying “close my note.” Django + Next.js.
d_careeros: A career compass for software engineers in the AI era: roadmaps with importance/demand/automation-risk signals, curated resources and project-first learning. Trilingual (EN/ES/ZH).
